name: OpenPayd API
description: OpenPayd provides payment infrastructure for businesses, offering accounts, beneficiary management, transactions, currency exchange, and open banking capabilities. The API enables businesses to create payment accounts, manage beneficiaries, initiate payouts, and handle currency conversions.
